title: 6 Months Accounts Payable Executive #NJN
raw_description:
Marymount/ Bishan

Mon - Fri 9am-6pm

Accounts Payable

  • Perform 3 way match of vendor invoices, debit note & credit note against Purchase Order and Delivery Order. Investigate differences if 3 way match fails.
  • Posting of vendor invoices into accounting system
  • Checking of external service engineer OT claims prior to submission to recruitment agency for invoice issuance to the Company
  • Generate AP aging report. Reconcile of AP and subledger of GL.
  • Maintain records of vendor account and perform SOA reconciliation to ensure liabilities are fully taken up
  • Perform bi-monthly intercompany reconciliation (AR and AP) via excel file upload to Intercompany Reconciliation Tool
  • Check of employee expense claim ensuring adherence to expense policy and posting of expense claim
  • Preparation of monthly payment runs (GIRO, TT, netting, cheque) in accordance with the payment calendar and requesting for bank authorizers approval.
  • Review and update AP policy in accordance with the changes in Group Central Directive.
  • Checking of vendor account creation in accounting system (4 eye principle check)
  • Creation of customer account in accounting system
  • Perform various internal controls in accordance with Group & Company’s policy

General Ledger

  • Preparation and posting of recurring and ad hoc journal entries
  • Posting of fixed assets depreciation and direct debit deduction from bank account.
  • Perform bank reconciliation and PO clearing account
  • Maintenance of Fixed Assets Register and perform physical fixed assets sighting and obtain confirmation from the HODs.
  • Preparation and updating of monthly Balance Sheet Reconciliation Schedules (including Fixed Assets Register) with understanding of the transactions in the schedule
  • Follow up on long outstanding transactions in the Balance Sheet Reconciliation Schedules
  • Preparation and submission of monthly cash flow forecast & liquidity report
  • Preparation of department expense (“COO”) report to HODs
  • Support quarterly GST filing (AP side)
  • Ad hoc stock adjustments
  • Update foreign exchange rate
  • Support with quarterly and year end preparation of group reporting package
  • Support project job costing including:

-         Creating & re-opening of jobs

-         Closing completed jobs at month end

-         Generating & posting of engineer’s timesheet

-         Updating maintenance jobs in service timesheet template

-         Generating job costing reports at month end

-         Preparing monthly maintenance report

Requirements

  • Degree in Accounting
  • At least 2 years of relevant experience
  • Proficient in MS Office
  • Knowledge of ACCPAC / SAGE300 is advantageous


Jessica Nguyen Huynh Thanh Truc

CEI Reg. No. R23113787

EA License No. 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Ground operations standards are the key to ensuring that airports receive and dispatch aircraft efficiently and safely. You will supervise flight handling and manage ramp operations to ensure smooth aircraft handling.
  • Supervise and operate Full Ground Support Equipment
  • Perform flight rescue or service recovery under the direction of Duty Manager
  • Monitor and ensure smooth ground operations during shift.

Requirements:

  • Possess Class 3 driving license

Benefits:

  • Entitled to AWS
  • Entitled to Performance Bonus
  • Fresh graduates or those with diploma/degree but without relevant experience, will be placed under 6-month trainee program.

Compensation:

  • Basic salary from $2600 onwards
  • Entitled to shift allowance/month: average $240
  • Entitled to OT payment: average $200

Work Week & Shift: 6 days per week, rotating shift (morning, afternoon and overnight shift)
Working Hours: 44 hours per week
Location: Changi


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

raw_title: Assistant / Care Coordinator(237) - National University Polyclinics
title: Assistant / Care Coordinator(237) - National University Polyclinics
raw_description:
As part of the multidisciplinary team, provide holistic and incredible care, empower patients and caregivers to take charge of their own health through technology, raise awareness and accessibility of available resources that can be tapped on, nudging them towards action.

Strategic outcomes and goals include:

  • To build relationships with internal (care team) and external stakeholders (patients and caregivers).
  • To contribute to achieving clinical outcomes for preventive health screenings and reduce readmission and escalations to tertiary care, and, to gather social determinants of health pertinent to influencing social and health outcomes in positive ways
  • Leverage on technology to empower patients to improve health literacy and accessibility to resources
  • Responsible for assisting in coordinating and providing patient care activities. This includes the use of IT systems to track, perform and document established clinical indicators and care given to patient.
  • You will perform basic parameter measurements, close preventive screening and vaccination gaps in relation to national programmes/initiatives.
  • You will also provide basic health education to improve patients’ knowledge on lifestyle management, social and physical activities through social prescribing, the use of health monitoring devices (e.g. home blood pressure, glucose and weight monitoring, as well as advise patients on vaccination requirements.)

Requirement

  • Diploma preferred.
  • Qualification in health promotion will have an advantage.
  • Preferably with some working experience in healthcare
  • Good verbal and written communication skills
  • Pleasant disposition and personality
  • Possess good interpersonal skills, a positive attitude towards work and is a team player.
  • Good communication and coordination skills
  • Self-motivated and has interest in patient care.
  • Able to communicate in English and a local language/dialect.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office including Excel, Words and Power Point
  • Savvy in navigating IT programs

title: VETERINARY NURSE / TECHNICIAN
raw_description:
Job Description

  • Conduct diagnostic tests, laboratory procedures, and radiographic imaging (X-rays) as required

  • Prepare animals, surgical instruments, and treatment areas for surgical and medical procedures

  • Administer medications, vaccinations, anaesthesia, and treatments under the supervision of a Veterinarian

  • Provide emergency first aid, inpatient nursing care, and post-operative monitoring

  • Observe, assess, and accurately report on animals’ behaviour, vital signs, and clinical condition

  • Safely restrain animals for examination, treatment, and diagnostic procedures

  • Assist veterinarians during consultations, surgeries, and medical procedures

  • Collect, document, and maintain accurate animal case histories and medical records

  • Ensure compliance with clinical protocols, hygiene standards, and workplace safety procedures

Job Requirements

  • Minimum Degree in Veterinary Medicine

  • At least 2 years of relevant working experience in a veterinary clinic, hospital, or related animal care setting

  • Able to work independently with minimal supervision, as well as collaboratively within a multidisciplinary team

  • Strong sense of responsibility, professionalism, and ethical conduct

  • Demonstrates a caring, calm, and positive disposition when handling animals and interacting with colleagues or clients

  • Maintains strict confidentiality of medical records and client information

  • Committed to continuous professional development and keeping up to date with veterinary best practices

  • Open-minded, adaptable, and willing to learn new techniques and protocols

  • Able to prioritise work based on clinical urgency, presenting cases, and emergency situations.

  • Willing to work flexible hours when required to meet operational and emergency care needs

raw_title: Software Quality Assurance & Testing Analyst [Automation & Manual Testing; SIT; UAT; PROD] (Banking Wealth Management Application)
title: Software Quality Assurance & Testing Analyst [Automation & Manual Testing; SIT; UAT; PROD] (Banking Wealth Management Application)
raw_description:
Project: Wealth Management System Implementation - Bank Sector Client.

You will play a crucial role in driving testing efforts for the programme. This includes defining, developing, documenting, executing and reporting on test approaches and plans; collaborating closely with project teams as well as other relevant stakeholders such as end users, subject matter experts, technical teams etc.


Job Description

Your role will require close collaboration across multiple areas within the organization including but not limited to:

1. Project Management Office (PMO)

2. Information Technology (IT)

3. Product Development & Strategy (PD&S)

4. Business Units / Divisions (BU/Ds)

5. Operations (Ops)

6. Risk Management

8. Other relevant units as needed


You will need to develop expertise in understanding the business processes and functions supported by the new system as well as conduct detailed reviews of user requirements and specifications. You will also need to develop and execute test plans, procedures and scenarios to ensure that the system meets all requirements and works seamlessly with other systems.


Responsibilities:

• Define, develop, document, execute and report on test approaches and plans.

• Collaborate closely with project teams as well as other relevant stakeholders such as end users, subject matter experts, technical teams etc.

• Develop and maintain comprehensive test plans for each release, which cover functional and non-functional requirements.

• Design and implement automated and manual test scripts for both short-term and long-term needs.

• Conduct unit, integration and performance tests using various tools and frameworks.

• Provide regular status updates on testing progress and issues.

• Identify and track software defects and work with developers to resolve them.

• Ensure compliance with quality standards and best practices throughout the testing process.

• Support user acceptance testing (UAT) activities.

• Execute ad hoc queries and perform exploratory testing as needed.



Qualifications:

• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field.

• Minimum 3 years of experience in IT testing methodologies, tools and techniques.

• Experience in designing and implementing test automation solutions.

• Familiarity with Agile development methodologies.

• Good communication skills and ability to interact effectively with cross-functional teams.

• Ability to analyze complex problems and propose innovative solutions.

• Excellent attention to detail and strong organizational skills.



Good To Have:

- Automation Software Testing: TOSCA; Selenium; Appium

- Jira; Confluence: AS400 Test Data Preparation; AS400 Host Data; SQL Query

- Domain Knowledge: Unit Trusts; Equities; Forex; Wealth Portfolio Management; Insurance; CRM MS365 Dynamics; Sibel CRM Application

title: Sales & Marketing Support Executive
raw_description:
The Lead Generation & Marketing Support Specialist will focus on identifying potential clients, promoting our outsourced customer service solutions, and supporting sales and marketing initiatives.

Key Duties & Responsibilities

  • Research and identify potential business leads using online platforms, databases, and industry-specific tools

  • Conduct cold outreach (calls, emails, social media) to promote contact centre and BPO services to prospects

  • Initiate and manage lead engagement through calls, email campaigns, and video conferencing

  • Present tailored business proposals and deliver compelling demo sessions to prospective clients

  • Create and customize sales presentations and marketing materials aligned with the company’s branding and service offerings

  • Collaborate with the sales team to support customer acquisition and retention strategies

  • Analyze market trends, industry shifts, and competitor offerings to refine outreach strategies

Qualifications & Experience

  • Tertiary qualifications in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field

  • At least 2 years of experience in lead generation, sales support, or customer service—ideally in the BPO or outsourcing industry

Other Requirements

  • Experience with SEO, social media marketing, and digital design tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe)

  • Familiarity with contact centre AI tools such as conversational AI Platforms, chatbots, virtual agents, speech analytics tools, AI powered CRM/ Quality Management tools

  • Proactive, self-motivated, and skilled in problem-solving and initiative-taking

title: Manufacturing Engineer
raw_description:
JOB SUMMARY

Duties include generating PCR and engineering drawing and exploring alternate solution to solve resource or production constrain. He is also responsible to plan, organize and manage assigned project activities. This requires direct interaction with customer, vendors and functional departments to monitor and ascertaining all jobs are progressing within schedule and meeting deadline.

RESPONSIBILITIES & DUTIES

  • Understand the full requirements of all manufacturing and improvement project. Follow up on the kick start, execution, monitoring and work closely with related personnel to resolve issues until the completion of the project.
  • Perform technical review on sales order and work closely with the sales department or customer to clarify all technical specifications and job requirements on the sales order.
  • Generate PCR and manufacturing process plan.
  • Generate engineering drawings and perform drafting.
  • Support Asst. Engineering Manager on the job costing.
  • Continuously explore for new manufacturing method or new external providers to support the production.
  • Work closely with the Production Supervisor to resolve any production issue.
  • Support the procurement department to deal with external providers on all technical issues.
  • Understand and be aware of the impact of each activity to the company, its environment and minimize any detrimental results.
  • Follow safe work practices and procedures.
  • Ensure company and QHSE policies and procedures are adhered to at all times.
  • Participate/ attend all functions, activities and meeting organized by the company.
  • Perform other assignment and duties as and when required.

ACCOUNTABILITIES

  • Ensure on time issuance of PCR and drawings and correctness.
  • Ensure all projects are on schedule and completed on time.
  • Work with the team to achieve QHSE objectives.
  • Maintain good housekeeping at all times.

QUALIFICATION & EXPERIENCE

  • Degree preferably in Manufacturing/ Mechanical Engineering discipline or equivalent.
  • Preferably 2 years of relevant experience in the metal machining or oil and gas industries.

title: Research Intern
raw_description:
We are looking for a meticulous, diligent, and resourceful individual to evaluate the impact of sustainability projects. The intern will analyse case studies according to the Steward Leadership framework and identify scalable, sustainable projects that address environmental and social challenges.

Responsibilities:

  • Review case studies: Thoroughly evaluate all materials and present findings to the reviewing team.
  • Conduct desktop research on impact metrics, existing regulations, and industry standards to perform robust analysis of case studies.
  • Collaborate with manager and teammates: Work closely with the process manager and teammates to ensure smooth communication and adherence to timelines.
  • Assist in other administrative and research development duties as needed.

Requirements:

  • Postgraduate students from a relevant field such as Social Science, Business Administration, Corporate Sustainability, or Sustainable Development are preferred.
  • Attention to detail: Keen eye for spotting outstanding qualities in case studies and ensuring compliance with guidelines.
  • Time management skills: Ability to meet deadlines and manage the review process efficiently.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • Good team player yet able to work well independently.
  • Meticulous, analytical, highly organised and intellectually inquisitive.
  • Prior experience in evaluating case studies is a bonus.

Application deadline: 30 April 2026

Internship Period: 18 May – 25 Jun 26, full time.

Location: Singapore; Hybrid (you are required to attend meetings in-person when necessary)

To apply: Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter explaining your relevant experience to adelinefoo@stewardshipasia.com.sg.

We look forward to your application!

title: Operations Executive (Air Freight Export and Import)
raw_description:
Operations Executive, Air Export/Import

Location: Alps Avenue

You will support import/export air freight operations by managing bookings, coordinating cargo movement, preparing documentation, and ensuring compliance with safety and regulatory standards (e.g., IATA, RACAR). You'll be expected to liaise with customers and overseas partners to meet service excellence standards.

Principal Duties and Responsibilities

• Arrange shipment collection/traffic co-ordination

• Consolidation planning and trouble shooting

• Ensure that export/import job files are checked in system and supplier invoices

are registered as passed promptly. Responsible to complete the job process.

• Ensure that pre-alerts are sent in a timely manner to customers

• Execute export documentation, customs formalities, invoicing, cargo canvassing and bookings.

• Cargo Reservation. Place booking with airlines and/or co-loaders.

• Responding to overseas offices/partners e-mail

• To assist in ensuring safety and security compliance by stopping any suspicious cargo for further process and report to department supervisor/manager immediately. All Dangerous Goods to be handled in accordance with IATA Rules & Regulations.

• To prepare invoices with accurate charges to customers on a timely manner

• Adhere to the security procedures as per Regulated Air Cargo Agent Security Programme (RACAR)

• Any other duties assigned by the superiors. Including carry out duty after normal working hours, public holidays, on site job.

Requirements:

  • Minimum “O” Levels or equivalent

  • Strong experience in Air Export operation and document with basic air import clearance knowledge.

  • Minimum 3 years in air freight operations handling export/import activities.

  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply

  • Effective Interpersonal skills

  • Experience in Air Freight operations and documentation.

  • Willing to work on PH and weekends due to operational exigencies.

  • Able to work under tight timeline.

  • Possess high integrity and strong commitment.

  • Good knowledge of documentation of import/export procedures with interest in continuous learning.

  • A good team player and yet able to work independently.

  • At least 1–3 years of experience in air freight operations (export/import)

  • Good knowledge of customs and air cargo procedures

  • Willingness to work on weekends or PHs if required

If you’re keen to be part of a trusted global brand in shipping and logistics, apply now!
Please indicate which position you are applying for (Sea Freight or Air Freight), and include your last drawn salary and expected salary in your application.

📍 Please note: Air Freight role is based at 70 Alps Avenue;

title: Social Worker, Residential Services
raw_description:
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES AND ACCOUNTABILITIES

A. FUNCTIONAL

· Case management and counselling of boys admitted under Child Protection Orders, Probation Orders, Family Guidance Orders MSF-referred cases and Compassionate Ground cases.

· Carry out admission procedures for boys admitted to Boys’ Town, which includes handling intake interviews and liaising with stakeholders working with the boys prior to admission.

· Conduct assessment of identified needs through assessment tools such as Child and Adolescent Needs and Strengths (CANS) and Youth Level of Service/Case Management Inventory (YLS/CMI).

· Conduct sessions for the residents of Boys’ Town and their parents/caregivers according to their identified needs.

· Develop an Individualised Care Plan (ICP) for all residents admitted. As part of this ICP, you will be required to work closely with other internal and external stakeholders to ensure holistic care for the residents.

· Initiate and lead internal case reviews with the support of your clinical supervisor and Social Work Lead. Ensure that a periodic assessment of our residents’ progress in Boys’ Town is conducted.

· Provide timely reports on case progress to the Social Work Lead in and bring up cases for supervision accordingly. To undergo supervision with assigned supervisor on a monthly basis.

· Keep timely case records and ensure proper documentation of residents’ personal information and reports. (eg. Case notes, court reports, review reports, ICP, etc). Ensure the licensing audit requirements are met in the case management domain as advised by Head of Home.

· Represent the residents and Boys’ Town professionally in various platforms such as Court Hearings, MSF Reviews, School conferences, etc with the support of clinical supervisor.

· Conduct psychoeducational and therapeutic group work programmes as advised by Social Work Lead and/ or Head of Home.

· Liaise with Education Officers and schools which the residents are studying in and keep them informed of admission, discharge, and absence of the residents from any school programmes, as well as coming up with their education care plan.

· Work in collaboration with the Residential Services Leads, operations team and Education Officers in monitoring the progress of the residents, through the sharing of case related issues and intervention plans.

· Liaise with external agencies eg. Child Protection Officers, Probation Officers, Social Workers, Family Service Centres, Police for case management purposes and to support the case plans for the residents.

· Work in collaboration with the Programmes/Operations departments in organising annual camps for the residents. Work in close collaboration with the other staff of the Home and of the other components of Boys’ Town in matters pertaining to the welfare of our residents.

· Support in conducting research for Boys’ Town as necessary.

· Maintain complete confidentiality of all information pertaining to the residents of Boys’ Town.

· Other than the above, the Directors and/or Executive Director may assign you any other duties that are within reason for the benefit of the clients, and/or Boys’ Town.


B. ORGANIZATIONAL

· To participate actively in all fundraising activities as well as any other commitments that Boys’ Town undertakes.

· To work in close collaboration with other staff, departments and components of Boys’ Town.

· The Executive Director and or his/her representative may assign you any other duties that are within reason for the operational needs of Boys’ Town


EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATION REQUIREMENTS

· Bachelor / Master of Social Work OR other recognised Social Work qualifications from Singapore Association of Social Workers (SASW).

· Relevant experience in VWO/ NPO/ social service sector with direct experience in working with vulnerable children and youths and their families is desirable
description: KEY RESPONSIBILITIES AND ACCOUNTABILITIES A. FUNCTIONAL · Case management and counselling of boys admitted under Child Protection Orders, Probation Orders, Family Guidance Orders MSF-referred cases and Compassionate Ground cases. · Carry out admission procedures for boys admitted to Boys’ Town, which includes handling intake interviews and liaising with stakeholders working with the boys prior to admission. · Conduct assessment of identified needs through assessment tools such as Child and Adolescent Needs and Strengths (CANS) and Youth Level of Service/Case Management Inventory (YLS/CMI). · Conduct sessions for the residents of Boys’ Town and their parents/caregivers according to their identified needs. · Develop an Individualised Care Plan (ICP) for all residents admitted. As part of this ICP, you will be required to work closely with other internal and external stakeholders to ensure holistic care for the residents. · Initiate and lead internal case reviews with the support of your clinical supervisor and Social Work Lead. Ensure that a periodic assessment of our residents’ progress in Boys’ Town is conducted. · Provide timely reports on case progress to the Social Work Lead in and bring up cases for supervision accordingly. To undergo supervision with assigned supervisor on a monthly basis. · Keep timely case records and ensure proper documentation of residents’ personal information and reports. (eg. Case notes, court reports, review reports, ICP, etc). Ensure the licensing audit requirements are met in the case management domain as advised by Head of Home. · Represent the residents and Boys’ Town professionally in various platforms such as Court Hearings, MSF Reviews, School conferences, etc with the support of clinical supervisor. · Conduct psychoeducational and therapeutic group work programmes as advised by Social Work Lead and/ or Head of Home. · Liaise with Education Officers and schools which the residents are studying in and keep them informed of admission, discharge, and absence of the residents from any school programmes, as well as coming up with their education care plan. · Work in collaboration with the Residential Services Leads, operations team and Education Officers in monitoring the progress of the residents, through the sharing of case related issues and intervention plans. · Liaise with external agencies eg. Child Protection Officers, Probation Officers, Social Workers, Family Service Centres, Police for case management purposes and to support the case plans for the residents. · Work in collaboration with the Programmes/Operations departments in organising annual camps for the residents. Work in close collaboration with the other staff of the Home and of the other components of Boys’ Town in matters pertaining to the welfare of our residents. · Support in conducting research for Boys’ Town as necessary. · Maintain complete confidentiality of all information pertaining to the residents of Boys’ Town. · Other than the above, the Directors and/or Executive Director may assign you any other duties that are within reason for the benefit of the clients, and/or Boys’ Town. B. ORGANIZATIONAL · To participate actively in all fundraising activities as well as any other commitments that Boys’ Town undertakes. · To work in close collaboration with other staff, departments and components of Boys’ Town. · The Executive Director and or his/her representative may assign you any other duties that are within reason for the operational needs of Boys’ Town EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATION REQUIREMENTS · Bachelor / Master of Social Work OR other recognised Social Work qualifications from Singapore Association of Social Workers (SASW). · Relevant experience in VWO/ NPO/ social service sector with direct experience in working with vulnerable children and youths and their families is desirable

title: Bank Operations Officer - Retail Banking: Card Payments
raw_description:
Job Description and Responsibilities
The role of the Card Operations Officer is to facilitate the processing of payments and postings from
internal stakeholders on a daily basis within the specified SLA, in addition to managing queries from
internally. This role entails the candidate to be working closely with Team Manager to ensure all
deliverables are met for the team.


Staff to be involved in:
• Processing of Fund Transfer, SmartPay, Cashplus, Balance Transfer, Refunds requests
• Ensuring accuracy of financial entries posted
• Tracking of own daily productivity on trackers
• Handling of emails from internal stakeholders
• Timely closure of service requests assigned
• Assist in the reconciliation of ledgers used for Card Operations
• Ensure all documents are filed and archived in accordance with bank and regulatory policy
• Adherence to risk and compliance standards of the bank
• Team player and demonstrates personal excellence in going beyond
• Performing any other administrative tasks as required by the management


Requirements
• Diploma/Degree Holder
• Preferably 1 - 2 years of relevant banking experience
• Independent and able to multi-task and cope with change and in a fast-paced environment
• Possess strong analytical and problem-solving skills, able to think objectively and 'think outside
the box' when analyzing issues
• Meticulous with an eye for details and quality mindset
• Strong cross-functional collaboration and communications skills, driving outcomes through
influence and negotiations
• Proficient in the use of Microsoft Office, specifically Microsoft Excel, Word & PowerPoint

title: ⚡🌍 SALES & MARKETING ROLE 🌍
raw_description:
Entry Level | Training Provided | Performance-Based | Uncapped Earnings

Growth • Exposure • Income • Leadership

⚠️ PLEASE READ THIS PROPERLY BEFORE APPLYING

This is not a typical sales job ad.

Most job ads promise:

“Competitive salary”

“Career progression”

“Good environment”

Then reality hits:

Salary barely moves

Promotions are unclear

You feel replaceable

You’re stuck doing repetitive work

👉 This role exists for people who want MORE than average.

🔥 WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

This opportunity is designed for individuals who are:

Fresh graduates unsure where to start

ORD personnel who don’t want to waste their early years

Career switchers stuck in low-growth roles

People who want income growth based on performance, not time

If you value:

Skill development

Income potential

Clear career progression

Personal growth

👉 Then keep reading.

🏢 WHO WE ARE & WHY WE’RE HIRING

We are a fast-growing sales & marketing organisation expanding due to increased demand and new projects.

Our belief is simple:

Your background does not determine your future.

Your attitude, discipline, and effort do.

That’s why we:

Hire entry-level individuals

Provide full training

Promote based on performance

Develop people into leaders

Many of our current managers:

Started with zero experience

Were once fresh grads / ORD

Took a risk instead of choosing comfort

❌ WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

Let’s be very honest.

This is NOT:

A fixed-salary comfort job

A slow-paced office role

A “do minimum, still get paid” position

A job where success is automatic

If you are looking for:

Stability without effort

Guaranteed outcomes

Zero pressure

👉 This role is not suitable.

✅ WHAT THIS ROLE ACTUALLY IS

This role IS:

A performance-driven sales & marketing role

A real-world skill-building platform

A career accelerator

A place where effort = rewards

You are here to:

Learn

Execute

Improve

Grow

📚 WHAT YOU WILL LEARN (REAL VALUE)

Sales is not just about talking.

Sales is about:

Psychology

Communication

Influence

Confidence

Problem-solving

In this role, you will be trained in the following key areas 👇

1️⃣ Communication & Confidence Mastery

You will learn how to:

Speak clearly and confidently

Read people and situations

Build rapport quickly

Ask the right questions

Present ideas persuasively

Handle objections professionally

➡️ These are life skills, not just job skills.

2️⃣ Sales & Marketing Fundamentals

You will be coached step-by-step on:

Understanding customer needs

Product positioning & value selling

Ethical persuasion

Closing techniques

Follow-ups & relationship building

➡️ Skills you can use anywhere in life or business.

3️⃣ Mental Resilience & Discipline

Sales builds:

Emotional control

Consistency under pressure

Confidence through rejection

Strong work ethic

Instead of avoiding challenges, you’ll be trained to:

Stay calm under pressure

Bounce back from rejection

Focus on long-term growth

➡️ This is why many people say sales changes their mindset forever.

4️⃣ Early Leadership Exposure

Unlike traditional jobs where leadership takes years:

Here, you will:

Learn leadership principles early

Be exposed to mentoring & guiding others

Take responsibility faster if you perform

➡️ Leadership is earned, not waited for.

🎓 FULL TRAINING PROVIDED (NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED)

If your concern is:

“I’ve never done sales before”

Good news: We expect that.

We provide:

Structured onboarding

Step-by-step sales training

Daily coaching & mentoring

Clear systems & frameworks

Continuous feedback & improvement

👉 You don’t need experience.

👉 You need commitment and coachability.

💰 INCOME STRUCTURE — PERFORMANCE BASED & UNCAPPED

This is not a fixed-salary role.

How income works:

Performance-based earnings

No income ceiling

High performers earn significantly more

Your income grows as your skills grow

Traditional jobs:

Pay for time

Cap your income

Reward seniority

This role:

Pays for results

Rewards improvement

Gives control back to you

📈 CAREER PROGRESSION — CLEAR & MERIT-BASED

No politics.

No guessing.

No waiting years.

Typical progression path:

Entry Level Sales

Senior Sales

Team Leader

Assistant Manager

Manager

You advance based on:

Performance

Consistency

Leadership ability

➡️ You earn your next level.

✈️ TRAVEL, EXPOSURE & OPPORTUNITIES

High performers may receive:

Local & overseas travel opportunities

Exposure to different markets

Incentive trips

Growth experiences beyond office work

➡️ Travel here is earned, not promised.

🎉 TEAM CULTURE & ENVIRONMENT

You will not be alone.

Our culture includes:

Supportive mentorship

Team nights & bonding

Incentives & recognition

Healthy competition

Growth-focused environment

➡️ You grow faster when surrounded by driven people.

👥 WHO SHOULD APPLY

This role is ideal if you are:

Fresh graduate wanting real skills

ORD personnel ready to build your future

Career switcher seeking growth & income

Hungry, disciplined, and open to learning

🚫 WHO SHOULD NOT APPLY

Do not apply if you:

Want comfort without effort

Avoid accountability

Expect results without work

Dislike performance-based systems

This role is demanding — but rewarding.

🧠 FINAL REALITY CHECK

This role will:

Push you

Challenge you

Test your discipline

But it will also:

Build confidence

Increase earning power

Develop leadership

Open future opportunities

Comfort is easy.

Growth is valuable.

👉 CALL TO ACTION

🔥 If you are serious about growth, income, and exposure:

👉 DM us now or apply today

👉 Limited slots due to training capacity

Stop waiting.

Start building.

title: Banking Associate
raw_description:
Responsibilities:


1. Customer Engagement:

- Build and maintain strong relationships with customers.

- Provide excellent customer service and address inquiries regarding financial products and services.

- Actively engage in cross-selling and upselling financial products to meet sales targets.


2. Product Knowledge:

- Stay updated on the bank's products and services.

- Effectively communicate product features and benefits to customers.

- Assist customers in selecting the right banking products to meet their financial needs.


3. Sales Targets:

- Achieve and exceed monthly sales targets.

- Identify opportunities for revenue generation and actively pursue them.

- Collaborate with team members to enhance overall sales performance.


4. Documentation and Processing:

- Assist customers in completing necessary documentation for various financial transactions.

- Ensure accuracy and compliance with financial regulations in all customer interactions.

- Process the forwarding of account openings, loan applications, and other financial transactions efficiently.


5. Compliance:

- Stay informed about and adhere to all relevant banking/ financial regulations and compliance standards.

- Ensure that all customer interactions and transactions comply with internal policies and external regulations.


6. Problem Resolution:

- Address and resolve customer issues and complaints in a timely and effective manner.

- Collaborate with other departments to resolve complex customer inquiries.


7. Team Collaboration:

- Work closely with team members to achieve overall goals.

- Participate in team meetings and contribute to a positive team environment.


8. Market Research:

- Stay informed about industry trends, market conditions, and competitor offerings.

- Provide feedback to management regarding customer preferences and market demands.


9. Training and Development:

- Participate in ongoing training programs to enhance product knowledge and sales skills.

- Share insights and best practices with team members to improve overall performance.


Qualifications:

- Local diploma or A Levels; bachelor's degree in business or related field is a plus.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills.

- Knowledge of banking products and services.

- Ability to work in a target-driven environment.

- Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

title: Admin Executive
raw_description:
At Rainbow Centre, we believe in a world where persons with disabilities are empowered and thriving in inclusive communities. Our team of passionate social workers supports children and youth with disabilities and their families in leading meaningful lives—where they are safe, connected, healthy, and heard.

Job Responsibilities:

The Administration Operations Executive is responsible for ensuring the smooth and effective daily operations of RC’s services. The role provides reliable administrative, data, and operational support to service leaders and teams, enabling them to focus on high-quality service delivery to clients and families. This role supports a broad range of administrative and operational functions, including financial and staff administration, client records management, procurement support, data integrity, reporting, and customer service.

Job Requirements:

  • A good diploma or tertiary qualification in Business Administration, Linguistics, Economics or other relevant field

  • Experience in business administration, finance, procurement or customer service will be an advantage

  • Experience with project management software (e.g., Asana, Trello, Jira) and CRM systems is a plus

Service is at the heart of RC’s purpose and we seek to serve our clients with respect, dedication and compassion, understanding that we are entrusted by society to serve with excellence and the highest ethical standards. Join us if you share our passion and values.

title: Quantity Surveyor
raw_description:
Job Description:

  • Review drawings, take off quantities, prepare Bills of Quantities.
  • Liaise with the construction team & design team to prepare documents for Request for Quotation (RFQ).
  • Source for potential sub-contractors & suppliers and send out invitations for RFQs.
  • Organise, compare, analyse and prepare reports for quotations received.
  • Coordinate queries and clarifications between tenderers and construction team during RFQ stage including arranging and attending for meetings.
  • Assist QS Manager / Contracts Manager in preparation of tender submission.
  • Coordinate post-tender interviews between tenderers, construction team, QS team and contracts team.
  • Assist QS Manager / Contracts Manager in quantity measurements and cost estimates for administration of sub-contracts, price comparation and negotiation.
  • Prepare contract documents for awarded sub-contractors & suppliers.
  • Performing contract administration including but not limiting to valuation of payments and variation claims and settlement of final account with sub-contractors and suppliers in accordance to contract requirements.
  • Perform all duties in accordance with CCCC policies, processes, systems and procedures.
  • ny other ad-hoc tasks assigned by QS Manager / Contracts Manager.

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor's Degree in Quantity Survey or equivalent.
  • At least 2-3 years of working experience in the related field is required for this position.
  • Tender experience is preferred.
  • Experience in building, HDB, condominium projects, or projects of similar scale, complexity, and nature, will be an advantage.
  • Strong communication, analytical, negotiation and time management skills.
  • Proficient computer skills, including advanced proficiency in Excel.
  • Able to work independently with minimum guidance in fast paced environment.
  • 5.5 days work week.

title: Summer Internship Programme
raw_description:
Summer Internship Programme

Sapience SG

Location: 1 Pasir Panjang Road, Labrador Tower, Singapore
Industry: Financial Planning (Banking & Financial Services)
Employment Type: Full-Time Internship
Allowance: SGD 1,500 – 2,000 per month

Programme Period

Start March 2026

Work Schedule

Monday to Friday

Programme Overview

The Sapience SG Summer Internship Programme is a structured development programme designed for students and fresh graduates who are exploring career pathways in finance, business, and strategy.

Participants will gain practical exposure through professional training, mentorship, and hands-on learning experiences that go beyond a traditional internship.

Key Responsibilities & Learning Outcomes

Participants will:

  • Attend structured training sessions focused on financial fundamentals, business concepts, and professional workplace skills
  • Participate in networking sessions with industry professionals and mentors
  • Work towards completing relevant certification papers to strengthen professional knowledge and credentials
  • Develop pitching, presentation, and communication skills through guided practice
  • Gain exposure to how financial planning, business operations, and strategic decision-making are carried out in real-world settings

Requirements

  • Aged 21 and above
  • Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident
  • Completed GCE A-Levels or a Local Diploma

Who Should Apply

  • Students or fresh graduates exploring potential career paths
  • Individuals eager to develop professional skills and industry exposure
  • Candidates who are motivated, open to learning, and keen to grow in a collaborative environment

What We Offer

  • Monthly allowance of SGD 1,500 – 2,000
  • Structured learning and close mentorship

title: Lab Assistant (Chemical Manufacturing MNC)
raw_description:
Our client is a Manufacturing MNC for Chemical Materials. Due to business needs, they are now recruiting a Lab Technologist to be part of their Lab Team for ongoing transformation projects. They are located in the West - easily accessible.

Duties of Lab Technologist:

  • Conduct sampling, inspection, testing, and release of raw materials, in-process, and finished goods to ensure compliance with specifications.
  • Handle sample receipt, labeling, storage, and review of Certificates of Analysis.
  • Maintain and calibrate laboratory equipment, ensuring accuracy and reliability of test results.
  • Monitor lab inventory and support smooth daily operations.
  • Report and manage quality or safety non-conformances, including issuing NC forms to suppliers.
  • Support internal/external audits and ensure compliance with QEHSMS, safety, and 5S standards.
  • Perform additional tasks as assigned by the QA Manager.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Chemical related field
  • 1-2 years of lab/QA experience in chemical or relevant industry

We regret that only shortlisted candidate will be notified.

title: Marketing Executive
raw_description:
Job Opportunity: Marketing Executive (Healthcare Industry)

Location: Above Kent Ridge MRT
Employment Type: Full-Time | 5-Day Work Week

About the Role

Anglo Caregivers is looking for a creative and driven Marketing Executive to help tell the stories that matter — of caregivers, families, and meaningful care.

You’ll play a key role in shaping our brand voice, creating engaging digital content, and running marketing campaigns that connect families with trusted live-in caregivers. This role suits someone who enjoys storytelling, hands-on content creation, and purpose-led work in the healthcare space.

Why Join Us

  • Young & Supportive Team – Collaborative, open, and hands-on environment

  • Meaningful Work – Help families care for elderly or persons with disabilities

  • Excellent Location – Direct MRT access at Kent Ridge

What We Offer

  • 5-Day Work Week (9:30am – 6:30pm)
    May require to work on Sundays for filming

  • Purpose-Driven Career – See the real impact of your work on families

  • Mentorship & Training – Structured onboarding and ongoing guidance

  • Attractive Benefits

    • 14 days annual leave

    • Birthday leave

    • Performance & annual bonuses

    • Medical & dental reimbursements

    • Salary commensurate with experience

Key Responsibilities

Content Creation & Storytelling

  • Create engaging content for TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, and Google My Business

  • Produce short- and long-form videos, including caregiver and family interviews

  • Lead Caregiver Feature Campaigns that highlight dedication and impact

Campaign & Digital Marketing

  • Plan and execute marketing campaigns from concept to launch

  • Support SEO and AI-driven initiatives through blog and content creation

  • Assist with Google Ads and Facebook Ads to reach families and caregivers

Community & Partnerships

  • Collaborate with recruiters to build and engage a strong caregiver community

  • Support initiatives to attract live-in caregivers

  • Assist in developing partnerships aligned with our mission and brand

What We’re Looking For

  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related fields
    (Open to entry-level candidates with relevant internship experience)

  • Passionate about healthcare / caregiving.

  • Strong written and spoken English

  • Familiar with social media platforms and digital marketing fundamentals

  • Experience with tools like Canva, CapCut, Ahrefs, or similar is a plus

  • Strong writing, editing, and attention to detail

  • Photography or basic videography skills are an advantage

About Anglo Caregivers

Anglo Caregivers is a Singapore-based live-in caregiver agency specialising in long-term, suitable caregiver placements for sick elderly and adults with care needs.

For over 10 years, we have supported more than 1,400 families through the caregiving and regulatory process. Our work is advisory, relationship-driven, and focused on the right match — not quick placements or aggressive sales targets.

We believe caregiving goes beyond physical tasks. It is about trust, communication, and genuine human connection. As pioneers in Mandarin- and English-speaking caregiver placements, we help families build meaningful bonds with those who care for their loved ones.

If you’re looking to build a marketing career with purpose and real-world impact, we’d love to hear from you.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: MANAGEMENT TRAINEE
raw_description:
Key Responsibilities

· Support ground operations across multiple F&B stalls, including daily opening and closing procedures, cleanliness and compliance with hygiene standards.

· Monitor and coordinate stall operators' performance, ensuring adherence to house rules, safety regulations, and service expectations.

· Assist in stall allocation, onboarding and exit processes for new and existing vendors.

· Work closely with operations managers and outsourced vendors to ensure smooth day-to-day operations and quick resolution of on-site issues.

· Handle customer feedback and complaints in a professional and timely manner; propose solutions and escalate complex cases when necessary.

· Prepare shift rosters and duty assignments to support manpower needs during peak and off-peak periods.

· Track sales trends, footfall patterns and stall performance through daily reports; support the management team in analysing data to improve operations.

· Support periodic audits and compliance checks, including food hygiene inspections and internal SOP reviews.

· Coordinate with external contractors and suppliers (e.g., pest control, equipment servicing) to maintain operational standards.

· Assist in marketing or promotional activities such as festive events, loyalty programmes, or seasonal campaigns at assigned sites.

· Participate in training and development sessions to build leadership, problem-solving, and people management skills.

· Perform other duties as assigned by the management.


Requirements

· Minimum Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline.

· Strong willingness to learn and grow in the F&B industry.

· Proficient in English and Mandarin (to liaise with Mandarin-speaking colleagues).

· Other languages such as Malay are a plus.

· Comfortable with working 6 days a week, including weekends, public holidays, and long hours.

· Good communication and interpersonal skills.

· Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).

title: Purchasing Officer - WCAN
raw_description:
Responsibilities:

  • Oversee the full procurement lifecycle, including sourcing local and international suppliers, negotiating contracts, and issuing purchase orders.

  • Develop and implement procurement strategies to optimize costs and enhance operational efficiency.

  • Conduct market research to identify and evaluate potential suppliers based on quality, pricing, and reliability.

  • Manage company facilities, logistics, and shipping operations for both local and international activities.

  • Ensure compliance with company policies, legal regulations, ISO standards, and HSE requirements.

  • Minimum 3 years of practical procurement experience, preferably within M&E, construction, engineering, facilities management, or manufacturing industries.

  • Excellent negotiation, communication, and interpersonal skills.

  • Demonstrated ability to manage multiple procurement projects concurrently.

  • Detail-oriented with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

  • Capable of working independently or collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.

  • Solid understanding of Singapore’s procurement regulations and industry best practices.

title: Occupational Therapist - Paediatrics (Full-time/Part-time/Locum)
raw_description:
About the Role

We are seeking passionate Paediatric Occupational Therapists to join our team supporting children across THKMC’s early childhood and developmental programmes, including but not limited to EIPIC, DS-LS, and our dedicated paediatric centres, Children Therapy Spaces.


As part of THK Therapy Services, you will work alongside families, educators, and multidisciplinary teams to empower children in developing functional independence and meaningful participation in daily life. Therapists may be deployed across centre-based or community-based paediatric programmes depending on organisational needs.


Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct assessments and provide goal-directed occupational therapy interventions for children with developmental, sensory, motor, and functional challenges.
  • Collaborate with families, teachers, and team members in designing and implementing Individualised Intervention Plans (IIPs).
  • Deliver therapy through individual or group sessions in classroom, centre-based, or community settings.
  • Provide home programmes and caregiver training to support the child’s development beyond therapy sessions.
  • Participate, where applicable, in multidisciplinary case discussions to support holistic care planning for the child.

Professional Development Opportunities

  • Opportunities for growth and learning in paediatric occupational therapy through supervision, mentorship, and exposure to varied caseloads.
  • Access to support from experienced paediatric clinicians and allied health colleagues within THKMC.


Requirements

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Occupational Therapy.
  • Fully registered or eligible for registration with the Allied Health Professions Council (AHPC), Singapore.
  • Passion for working with children and their families.
  • Experience in paediatric occupational therapy, early childhood intervention, or special education settings (e.g., EIPIC, DS-LS, SPED) is advantageous.
  • Fresh graduates with a strong interest in paediatrics are welcome to apply.
  • Strong interpersonal skills, team-oriented, with a proactive and positive work ethic.


Join Us

At THK Therapy Services, you will be part of a dedicated team working to create positive change in the lives of children and families. Join us in making a meaningful difference in the community.

title: General Ledger Accountant
raw_description:
【Roles & Responsibilities】

1. Being responsible for general ledger accounting and intercompany reconciliations of the Group’s overseas subsidiaries.

2. Being responsible for regularly general ledger accounts review to ensure accurate and timely bookkeeping, clearance, and compliance with supporting documents.

3. Being responsible for preparing financial statements, financial footnotes, and annual final financial statements for the Group’s overseas subsidiaries.

4. Being responsible for tax filing for the Group’s Singapore subsidiary.

5. Revising general ledger and accounting standards to promote standardization in accounting practices.

6. Driving tax sharing and financial analysis initiatives, including shared tax filing and BI financial analysis projects.

7. Being responsible for improving the financial information quality of served business units.


【Key Requirements:】

1. Bachelor’s degree or above in financial accounting or related fields education, with at least four years of experience in general ledger accounting or accounting firms. Experience with consolidated financial statements is preferred.

2. Familiarity with International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS) and Singaporean financial and tax regulations.

3. Proficiency in SAP systems.

4. Strong logical skills, stress resistance, teamwork, and organizational skills.

5. Able to work overtime under high-pressure during peak seasons.

6. Strong written and verbal communication skills in English and Mandarin.

7. Strong self-drive and learning ability

8. Knowledge of Chinese Accounting Standards and relevant tax regulations is a plus.


Others:

1. Specific salary details will be discussed during the interview. Salary is negotiable for candidates with excellent work experience.

2. Kindly include the following in your resume: Availability, Current salary, and Expected salary.

title: Recruitment Consultant / Executive Recruitment Consultant
raw_description:
About the role: This is an internal role within Kingsforce. Remuneration will be based on a basic salary + incentive scheme (once KPI is met).


Work Location: Commonwealth (5 mins walk from the MRT station)

Work Days: Mon - Fri, 8:30am - 6pm


What You’ll Do:


You’ll take charge of your own client accounts and manage the full recruitment process from start to finish. Your day-to-day will include:

  • Building and maintaining strong relationships with clients and candidates
  • Prospecting and developing new business opportunities
  • Understanding client needs, company culture, and job requirements
  • Drafting and advertising job postings across multiple platforms
  • Sourcing, screening, and interviewing potential candidates
  • Preparing candidate profiles and presenting recommendations to clients
  • Coordinating interviews, reference checks, and salary negotiations
  • Managing onboarding arrangements to ensure a smooth placement process
  • Updating in-house systems accurately so all departments stay informed
  • Staying current with market trends and consistently meeting your KPIs

About you:

  • Tertiary level qualifications in any field.
  • 2 - 4 years of experience in the recruitment industry, with experience performing business development
  • Possess CEI certificate from MOM (Certificate of Employment Intermediaries)
  • Good communication skills, both oral and written.
  • Comfortable communicating on the phone, and performing business development work.
  • Familiar with Microsoft Office applications.

What Does Success Look Like in This Role?

Success in this role means becoming a trusted partner to both clients and candidates, by connecting great people with great opportunities. You take ownership of your portfolio, drive results through meaningful relationships, and bring creative approaches to business development and recruitment.

A successful consultant:

  • Builds genuine, lasting relationships with clients and candidates.
  • Consistently meets or surpasses monthly and quarterly KPIs.
  • Takes initiative to uncover new business opportunities and market insights.
  • Ensures a seamless and positive experience for everyone involved in the hiring process.

*Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Economics Tuition Teacher
raw_description:
About Axiom Education
Axiom Education is a leading tuition centre for IB, A-Level (H2), Integrated Programme (IP) and O-Level. We pair rigorous, structured teaching with a fun, competitive classroom vibe. With proven materials, engaging methods and a vibrant, high-energy learning community, our students consistently climb to 7s and As.


The Role
Teach IGCSE, IB & H2 Economics full-time. Run interactive, exam-focused classes and mentor students. Ideal for an educator with 3–5 years of strong results.


What You’ll Do

  • Deliver engaging lessons aligned to IGCSE, IB & H2 Economics syllabus
  • Create notes, practice sets and model answers; track progress with clear, actionable feedback.
  • Coach exam technique: DRQ/data response, essay planning, timed practice, and marking-criteria alignment.
  • Provide mentorship beyond class (consults, study plans, script reviews).
  • Stay current with syllabus updates and exam trends.

What You Bring

  • 3–5 years proven IB/H2/IGCSE Economics teaching or tutoring experience with strong outcomes.
  • Degree in Economics or a closely related field.
  • Mastery of core areas (micro, macro, international, development; for H2: market structures, elasticity, externalities, fiscal/monetary policy, balance of payments).
  • Clear communicator; organised, proactive, high-energy, student-centric.

Compensation (Full-Time)
Revenue-share on Net Class Fees with significant upside as your classes scale.


Location

  • Holland Village
  • Balmoral


Apply Now
Send your resume to info@axiomeducation.sg.

raw_description:
As a Digital Marketing Executive, you will lead the strategic planning and execution of integrated marketing campaigns to generate leads and increase sales. You will manage the paid channels (Google Ads, Meta, YouTube) and social media, coordinating marketing activities to ensure consistent branding and messaging aligned with company goals.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Develop and execute digital marketing campaigns across various channels, including paid channels (Google Ads, GDN, Meta, YouTube), display advertising, online advertising, content marketing, and email marketing
  • Develop and implement effective search engine optimization (SEO) strategies to improve organic search rankings and enhance brand visibility online
  • Collaborate with Key Opinion Leaders (KOLs) on various marketing campaigns, events, and social media initiatives to drive engagement and credibility
  • Content planning and copywriting for social media platforms such as Meta, IG, TikTok, and XiaoHongShu.


Skills and Qualifications:

  • Education: Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.
  • Strong working experience in Meta Ads, Google AdWords, AdWords Editor, Meta Ads & Google Analytics.
  • Strong understanding of multi-channel marketing strategies.
  • Creative thinker with a strong sense of brand development.
  • Analytical mindset with proficiency in marketing analytics tools.
  • Experience in project management with a proven ability to meet deadlines.
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

title: Solutions Consultant
raw_description:
Area of Responsibility:


Presales Consultant is an important role KM’s Office Solutions team. In Singapore, we pride ourselves and our strength to WIN over competition has always been our strength in differentiating from the competition with Office Solutions and also WINNING deals with the winning propositions from Office Solutions. The candidate’s main responsibility is to lead office solutions fact finding, proposals and presentation requirements in collaboration and support to the sales leaders and sales reps.


Essential Job Functions:

  1. Develop and provide leading edge services, solutions and offerings which meet customers’ needs based on current and emerging technologies or business trends with company’s products (along with those from third parties where necessary) by understanding customers’ needs in office environment and providing consultative technical expertise on business solutions
  2. Demonstrate software solutions and articulate the benefits of solutions, e.g. technical benefits for technical audiences, business benefits for commercially oriented audiences
  3. Interface and work with both internal and external parties to deliver solutions i.e. change how companies work and not just selling a product
  4. Support business activities and project implementation by providing direct technical assistance including technical support and training when required
  5. Lead technical presentations, solution workshops, and proof-of-concepts.
  6. Design Solutions Architecture with simple design and complex clustering & high availability architecture with application failover or leveraging customer infrastructure.
  7. For career growth, technical involvement along with BDSG for Managed IT Services and Infrastructure (endpoint management, RMM tools, backup, security, cloud migration, networking and etc)
  8. Drive continuous improvement and ensure customer satisfaction through post-deployment support and review
  9. Any other duties assigned by Management from time to time

Requirements:


1. Degree/Diploma in Engineering, Computer Science or IT

2. At least 1 years of relevant working experience

3. Strong interpersonal, analytical and communication skills

4. Good project and organisation skills and able to work independently

5. Excellent negotiation skills

6. Appreciates technology and how technology can help corporate customers overcome challenges at work with technology

title: Process Engineer
raw_description:
Primary Duties & Responsibilities

  • Responsible for Process Yield Controls and Improvement.
  • Handling day to day quality issue and ensure smooth manufacturing processes.
  • Involved in Quality & Innovation projects for the department which is targeted to accomplish continuous improvement through SPC/PDCA/LEAN project.
  • Supporting new product qualification (NPI/ NPR), design DT fixturing to build up manufacturing capability. 
  • Manufacturing Efficiency Improvement and Operation Support.
  • Process Documentation and Auditing in compliance with ISO requirements, government regulatory agencies, developing company health and safety policies.
  • Collaborate and work with other departments for process yield controls improvement in DT

Education

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, preferably in Mechanical, Mechatronics Engineering fields or its equivalents as Process Engineer in Optical/CNC/high technical manufacturing environment.
  • Candidates with more than 2 years relevant experience as maybe considered for Staff/Senior Process Engineer position.

Skills

  • Knowledge in ultraprecision Diamond Turning or CNC Machining with experience in multi-axis precision machining of various materials on Spherical and Aspherical machining
  • Statistical Process Control knowledge and able to provide analytical troubleshooting leadership. 
  • Ability to methodize and improve production processes with good knowledge of 6 Sigma, PFMEA, DOE, SPC tools, Minitab, AutoCAD, Optical Metrology (Zygo.etc).
  • Well developed oral and written communication skills, team player with strong sense of work responsibility
  • Proven tools, jigs and fixture design capabilities
  • Possess strong interpersonal skills and enjoy the process of problem-solving
  • Work effectively with other members of Coherent Corp.

Other Requirement

  • Must commit to Overseas Training estimate duration of 10 weeks at Coherent site in United States/Philippines for future date. Training bond 1.5 years will start from date of return from overseas. 
  • Non-color deficiency required to check optics quality 

Working Conditions

  • This role is 100% onsite
  • Monday to Friday office hours, 8am to 5.30pm
  • Work Location at : II-VI Singapore Pte Ltd
  • Block 5012, #04-07, TechPlace II, Ang Mo Kio Avenue 5, Singapore 569876

Our Website

https://www.coherent.com

title: Banking Sales Associate
raw_description:
Responsibilities:


1. Customer Engagement:

- Build and maintain strong relationships with customers.

- Provide excellent customer service and address inquiries regarding financial products and services.

- Actively engage in cross-selling and upselling financial products to meet sales targets.


2. Product Knowledge:

- Stay updated on the bank's products and services.

- Effectively communicate product features and benefits to customers.

- Assist customers in selecting the right banking products to meet their financial needs.


3. Sales Targets:

- Achieve and exceed monthly sales targets.

- Identify opportunities for revenue generation and actively pursue them.

- Collaborate with team members to enhance overall sales performance.


4. Documentation and Processing:

- Assist customers in completing necessary documentation for various financial transactions.

- Ensure accuracy and compliance with financial regulations in all customer interactions.

- Process the forwarding of account openings, loan applications, and other financial transactions efficiently.


5. Compliance:

- Stay informed about and adhere to all relevant banking/ financial regulations and compliance standards.

- Ensure that all customer interactions and transactions comply with internal policies and external regulations.


6. Problem Resolution:

- Address and resolve customer issues and complaints in a timely and effective manner.

- Collaborate with other departments to resolve complex customer inquiries.


7. Team Collaboration:

- Work closely with team members to achieve overall goals.

- Participate in team meetings and contribute to a positive team environment.


8. Market Research:

- Stay informed about industry trends, market conditions, and competitor offerings.

- Provide feedback to management regarding customer preferences and market demands.


9. Training and Development:

- Participate in ongoing training programs to enhance product knowledge and sales skills.

- Share insights and best practices with team members to improve overall performance.



Qualifications:

- Local diploma or A Levels; bachelor's degree in business or related field is a plus.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills.

- Knowledge of banking products and services.

- Ability to work in a target-driven environment.

- Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

title: Embedded Systems Engineer (Aerospace)
raw_description:
Job Description:

  • In charge of designing the PCB layout of electronic circuit boards and generate Gerber files for PCB fabrication.
  • Responsible in research and define efficient and reliable architecture to fulfil electronic circuit board requirements for the company drone systems.
  • In charge of firmware programming in embedded C/C++ language.
  • In charge of testing PCB assemblies thoroughly and ensure they operate as expected.
  • Responsible in sourcing suitable electronic components to implement the design architecture.
  • In charge of studying datasheets of the electronic components and design the schematic of electronic circuit boards that can fulfil the requirements.
  • Responsible in generateing documents and drawings of design and test.

Job Requirement:

  • Minimum Degree in Mechanical/ Electrical/ Aerospace/ Mechatronics Engineering or relevant
  • Minimum 3 years of working experience in electronic hardware and firmware design
  • Experience in analog and digital circuit design with experience in designing electronic circuits with microcontrollers, digital signal processors (DSP), field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs), etc
  • Proficient in schematic and PCB design tools such as Altium Designer, OrCAD Capture and PCB Designer, Autodesk EAGLE, etc and using instruments such as multimeters, oscilloscopes, logic analysers, etc. to troubleshoot issues on electronic circuit boards.
  • Proficient in C/C++ programming language.
  • Knowledge in various communication buses and protocols such as UART, I2C, SPI, CAN, Ethernet, etc.

To submit your application, please apply online to apply@rn-care.com or call +(65) 6513 5697 for private and confidential discussion.

Your interest will be treated with the strictest of confidence. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified or contacted.

RN Care Pte. Ltd
EA License No: 17C8900
